parameters.text: =📊 BTMS SCAN — {{ $now.toFormat('yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm') }} UTC ⚠️ No valid Elliott Wave setup found. Direction: {{ $json.direction }} | Confidence: {{ Math.round(($json.ew_confidence || 0) * 100) }}% Skipping setup generation for this session.

parameters.name: prompt

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ parent: { database_id: '' + $env.NOTION_SETUPS_DB_ID + '' }, properties: { Name: { title: [{ text: { content: 'BTCUSDT ' + $json.direction + ' — ' + ($json.fvg_description || 'Setup').substring(0, 50) } }] }, Direction: { select: { name: $json.direction } }, 'Entry Low': { number: $json.entry_low }, 'Entry High': { number: $json.entry_high }, 'Stop Loss': { number: $json.stop_loss }, 'Take Profit 1': { number: $json.tp1 }, 'Take Profit 2': { number: $json.tp2 }, 'Entry TF': { select: { name: $json.entry_tf || '15M' } }, 'FVG Description': { rich_text: [{ text: { content: ($json.fvg_description || '').substring(0, 2000) } }] }, 'Elliott Wave Context': { rich_text: [{ text: { content: ($json.ew_context || '').substring(0, 2000) } }] }, Confidence: { number: $json.confidence }, Status: { select: { name: 'Pending' } }, 'Scan Time': { date: { start: new Date().toISOString() } } } }) }}

parameters.name: prompt

parameters.query: UPDATE paper_trades SET status = 'closed', close_price = {{ $('Parse Validation').item.json.currentPrice }}, close_time = NOW(), notes = CONCAT(COALESCE(notes, ''), ' | Invalidated by BTMS Ops: {{ $('Parse Validation').item.json.validation.reason.replace(/'/g, '') }}') WHERE id = {{ $('Parse Validation').item.json.paper_trade_id }} AND status = 'open'
